title: RecipeDefinition
description: A pure-data, serializable workflow recipe definition for the Sweny engine.

id.description: Unique machine-readable identifier. Used for persistence and import/export.

description.description: Optional description of what this recipe does.

initial.description: Id of the first state to execute. Must be a key in 'states'.

states.description: All states keyed by their unique id. All routing must be explicit.

phase.description: Phase for swimlane grouping. 'learn' gathers data, 'act' does work, 'report' notifies.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the visual editor.

critical.description: If true, any failure immediately aborts the entire recipe.

next.description: Explicit default successor state id for linear chains. Use 'end' to stop successfully.

on.description: Outcome-based transitions. Keys: outcome string, status ('success'|'skipped'|'failed'), or '*' wildcard. Values: state id or 'end'.

provider.description: Provider category this state primarily relies on (e.g. 'observability', 'issueTracking', 'sourceControl', 'codingAgent', 'notification'). Pure metadata — no runtime effect. Used by Studio to surface required env vars per step.
